context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up a basic Ponder ERC-20 indexer following the skill's project structure, configuration patterns, schema conventions, and import patterns.

checklist.name: ABI as const
checklist.description: The ABI file exports the ABI with an `as const` assertion

checklist.name: Correct startBlock
checklist.description: The contract config sets startBlock to the deployment block (6082465), not 0 or omitted

checklist.name: RPC env var pattern
checklist.description: Uses PONDER_RPC_URL_1 (matching the PONDER_RPC_URL_<CHAIN_ID> convention) for the mainnet RPC

checklist.name: Hex type for addresses
checklist.description: Schema uses t.hex() (or equivalent hex column type) for address columns (from, to), not t.text()

checklist.name: Bigint for amounts
checklist.description: Schema uses t.bigint() for the transfer amount/value column, not t.integer() or t.text()

checklist.name: Snake case table name
checklist.description: The onchainTable name string is in snake_case (e.g. 'transfers' or 'transfer_events'), not camelCase

checklist.name: Virtual module imports
checklist.description: Indexing file imports from 'ponder:registry' and 'ponder:schema', not from relative file paths

checklist.name: Store API usage
checklist.description: Indexing function uses context.db for database writes (insert/upsert), not raw SQL

checklist.name: Exact tsconfig
checklist.description: tsconfig.json includes strict: true and target: 'ES2022' and module: 'ES2022'

checklist.name: GraphQL middleware
checklist.description: API route file uses the graphql() middleware from ponder for the query endpoint

checklist.name: Lowercase address
checklist.description: The USDC contract address in config is fully lowercase, not checksummed
